context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the credo-config instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always run `mix credo gen.config` first** — never hand-craft .credo.exs from scratch

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `--strict` in CI** — enables additional checks that are disabled by default

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Strict mode enables additional checks disabled by default (mostly design-related). CI must use `--strict`.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: > Use `mix credo gen.config` for the complete check list rather than writing it by hand.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Readability.MaxLineLength, [priority: :low, max_length: 120]},

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Design.AliasUsage, [if_nested_deeper_than: 2, if_called_more_often_than: 0]},

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Consistency.MultiAliasImportRequireUse, []},

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Design.DuplicatedCode, []},

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Design.TagTODO, [priority: :high]},

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: {Credo.Check.Readability.Specs, []},
